Bulk ordering information

Simple wholesale flow for your customers.

  • All listed products are sold in cartons only.
  • Each product card shows pieces per carton and full carton price.
  • Customers can add multiple cartons to cart.
  • Out-of-stock products stay visible but cannot be added.
  • Checkout is handled through inquiry and WhatsApp order message.
